description: Poly was Google's 3D asset library for browsing, publishing, and downloading 3D models and scenes. The public developer materials still reference a Poly API v1 hosted on poly.googleapis.com.
summary: poly.googleapis.com exposes one REST API surface, the Poly API v1 at https://poly.googleapis.com/v1; docs indicate OAuth 2.0 is required for at least user-specific endpoints, and Google API keys are generally supported for unauthenticated Google API requests, but no Poly-specific machine-readable spec was located.
